commands.summary: [AC-1] NVDA was unavailable in this Windows environment; `Get-Command nvda` and running process checks found no local NVDA installation/session.
[AC-1] audits/AUDIT-2026-06-22-screen-reader-a11y.md records the waiver and residual risk.
[AC-2] audits/AUDIT-2026-06-22-screen-reader-a11y.md reports no P0/P1 blockers found in the source/automated review and records the NVDA residual risk.

[AC-3] scripts/validate-accessibility.mjs checks landmarks, polite announcements, dialog semantics, focus handling, menu dismissal, PBQ labels, heatmap names, status messages, and keyboard flashcards.

environment.process_note: Inline acceptance-criterion evidence migrated to a formal evidence/runs record during the canonical RepoPact 1.6.0 migration (decision 0007). Original entries preserved verbatim in commands[].summary, prefixed by criterion id.
